FIELD.NAME: contextid
FIELD.COMMENT: Context for home page management access control, apart from tenant separation context does not affect visibility of pages - system or category context only

FIELD.NAME: name
FIELD.COMMENT: Page name is used in menus, it does not need to be unique when using using cohort visibility and users can see only one page with the same name

FIELD.NAME: title
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional page title, site name is used if NULL - recommended to be set when multiple pages present

FIELD.NAME: priority
FIELD.COMMENT: Available page with highest priority is picked as default page, pages are ordered from high to low priority

FIELD.NAME: status
FIELD.COMMENT: 0 means draft, 1 means visible with optional date restriction, 2 means archived

FIELD.NAME: guestvisible
FIELD.COMMENT: Are guests and not-logged-in users allowed to access the page?

FIELD.NAME: uservisible
FIELD.COMMENT: Are all users allowed to access the page? if 0 then cohort required

FIELD.NAME: hiddenfromtenants
FIELD.COMMENT: 1 means page is not visible when site is switched to any tenant, 0 means site can be visible when switch to tenant depending on other restrictions

TABLE.NAME: tool_muhome_cohortvisible
TABLE.COMMENT: Members of these cohorts may see page when uservisible is 0
